zh.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Shelly於大約1514年出生在英國哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆時，她的父親Sir William Shelley35歲，母親Alice Belknap35歲。她和Sir Roger Copley至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她埋葬在英國素瑞素瓦可。

zh-hans.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英国哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Shelly于大约1514年出生在英国哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆时，她的父亲Sir William Shelley35岁，母亲Alice Belknap35岁。她和Sir Roger Copley至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她埋葬在英国素瑞素瓦可。

nameMeanings.name: Shelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Shelley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Shelly was born about 1514, in Mapledurham, Hampshire, England, her father, Sir William Shelley, was 35 and her mother, Alice Belknap, was 35. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Sir Roger Copley. She was buried in Southwark, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Shelly est née environ 1514, à Mapledurham, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Shelley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Belknap, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Roger Copley. Elleenterrée à Southwark, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Shelly um 1514 in Mapledurham, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Shelley 35 und ihre Mutter Alice Belknap 35. Sie hatte mit Sir Roger Copley mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie wurde in Southwark, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Shelly è nata il circa 1514 nel Mapledurham, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Shelley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice Belknap, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Sir Roger Copley. Fu sepolta a Southwark, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Shellyが約1514年にイギリスハンプシュアイアマプレドウルハムで生まれた時，父Sir William Shelleyは35歳，母Alice Belknapは35歳であった。彼女はSir Roger Copleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリススリーソウスワークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Shelly(이)가 대략 1514년 영국 함프실르 마플레더람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Shelley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Belknap(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roger Copley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 수리 소우스워크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Shelly nasceu aproximadamente 1514, em Mapledurham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Shelley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Belknap, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Sir Roger Copley. Ela foi sepultada em Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Shelly родилась около 1514 г. в местности мапледурам, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Shelley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Belknap, 35. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Sir Roger Copley. Она была похоронена в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Shelly nació aproximadamente 1514, en Mapledurham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Shelley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Belknap, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Sir Roger Copley. Fue sepultada en Southwark, Surrey, Inglaterra.
